page_title: The Other Side of the Sea (Song)
text:
The Other Side of the Sea is the 2nd track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack, as well as the 2nd track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by Kohta Yamamoto.

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of Ashes on The Fire.

All occurrences

Episode 65 - Lara Tybur transforms into the War Hammer Titan
Episode 66 - Jean shoots at Falco
Episode 70 - Magath briefs the Warriors about Zeke's betrayal
Episode 72 - The Jaegerist coup
